title: Connect without takeover preserves an incumbent owner

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A healthy incumbent device session owns the configured device and takeover is omitted.

fault_script.action: Submit the request containing the unsupported_option field to the strict handler schema.
fault_script.expected_effect: The schema rejects the complete request before controller admission and records zero controller and plane calls.

fault_script.action: Advance the fake monotonic clock past the valid request deadline while its admission and request-id reservations are held.
fault_script.expected_effect: The request returns not_sent before admission and releases both the queue slot and request-id reservation.

fault_script.action: Keep the incumbent generation active while a valid request omits takeover.
fault_script.expected_effect: The connect reports CONTROL_BUSY without changing the incumbent generation.

steps.expect: Strict schema rejection before controller admission with zero controller and plane calls.
not_sent with the queue slot and request-id reservation released for a subsequent request.
CONTROL_BUSY with the incumbent generation unchanged.

pass.assertion: Schema-invalid input is rejected before controller admission and records zero controller and plane calls.
The response is not_sent and releases every queue and request reservation.
A connect without takeover returns CONTROL_BUSY and leaves the incumbent generation unchanged.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
